headline: Is A. O. Smith Corporation (AOS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is AOS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on A. O. Smith Corporation on r/ValueInvesting by Dynaheir-be. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on AOS. A. O. Smith Corporation’s share was trading at $56.68 as of May 20th. AOS’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.11 and 15.08 respectively according […]
